bird.summary: Lilian's lovebird (Agapornis lilianae), also known as the Nyasa lovebird, is a small African parrot species of the lovebird genus. It is ma…

locations.name: George Ernest Shelley
locations.summary: Captain George Ernest Shelley (15 May 1840 – 29 November 1910) was an English geologist and ornithologist.

locations.name: 利翁代國家公園
locations.summary: 利翁代國家公園（Liwonde National Park）是非洲國家馬拉維的國家公園，位於該國南部希雷河平原，距離布蘭太爾160公里，佔地548平方公里，成立於1973年，野生動物有羚羊、非洲象、水牛、鱷魚、河馬等。 外部連結 Worl…

relations.subject: Lilian's lovebird
relations.evidence: In 2004 its numbers in the wild were estimated to be less than 20,000 individuals. It currently inhabits Liwonde National Park (LNP) and a few cluster groups occur in the surrounding forests outside LNP
